nasb.text: Now the bronze pillars which were in the house of the Lord, and the stands and the bronze sea which were in the house of the Lord, the Chaldeans broke in pieces and carried the bronze to Babylon.

esv.text: And the pillars of bronze that were in the house of the Lord, and the stands and the bronze sea that were in the house of the Lord, the Chaldeans broke in pieces and carried the bronze to Babylon.

cnv.text: 耶和華殿的銅柱，以及耶和華殿的銅座和銅海，迦勒底人都打碎了，把銅運到巴比倫去。

ccb.text: 迦勒底人打碎耶和华殿中的铜柱、盆座和铜海，把铜运往巴比伦，
